_README: SAMPLE / SEED DATASET — fictional postings shipped with the repo so the project runs fully OFFLINE. Several entries intentionally omit salary_min/salary_max to exercise the LLM salary estimator. Not real job listings.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Own and scale our payments API. You will design async services in Python/FastAPI, tune Postgres, and run infrastructure on AWS. 6+ years experience.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer (React)
jobs.description: Build delightful dashboards with React 18, TypeScript and Tailwind. Strong eye for glassmorphism UI and accessibility.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Train and serve recommendation models at scale. Experience with PyTorch, feature stores, and Kubernetes-based serving required.

jobs.title: Junior Full-Stack Developer
jobs.description: Entry-level role for a recent grad. Work across a Node.js/React stack with mentorship from senior engineers.

jobs.title: Staff Site Reliability Engineer
jobs.description: Lead reliability for a multi-region platform. Deep Kubernetes, Terraform, and Go tooling experience. On-call leadership.

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.description: Design batch and streaming data pipelines. Strong SQL, Python and orchestration (Airflow) skills.

jobs.title: Senior Rust Engineer
jobs.description: Build high-performance networking components in Rust. Experience with async Rust and systems programming.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Automate CI/CD and infrastructure-as-code. Terraform, AWS, and container orchestration.

jobs.title: Principal Software Architect
jobs.description: Define the architecture for core banking systems. 12+ years experience, strong Java/Spring and event-driven systems.

jobs.title: Mobile Engineer (iOS)
jobs.description: Craft a polished consumer iOS app with SwiftUI. Strong attention to UX and performance.

jobs.title: Platform Engineer
jobs.description: Build internal developer platforms and tooling in Go. Kubernetes operators and gRPC services.

jobs.title: Mid-Level PHP Developer
jobs.description: Maintain and extend a large e-commerce platform built on Laravel with a Vue frontend.

jobs.title: AI Research Engineer
jobs.description: Prototype and evaluate novel model architectures. Strong research background and JAX/PyTorch fluency.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Lead the frontend for our analytics suite. React/Next.js, performance budgets, and design-system stewardship.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
jobs.description: Build GraphQL APIs in TypeScript/Node. Mid-to-senior level, ownership over service reliability.
